description_long: This is a classic, high-backed armchair upholstered in a light beige or cream-colored material, likely leather or faux leather. The seat, backrest, and inner armrests are deeply tufted with buttons, creating a luxurious, quilted appearance. The armrests are thick, padded, and smoothly upholstered, providing ample comfort. The chair features a wingback design, with the sides of the backrest extending forward for added support and style. The legs are made of dark wood, elegantly curved in a cabriole style, adding a touch of traditional sophistication. The back of the chair is plain and smoothly upholstered, contrasting with the ornate front and sides.
description: A high-backed, tufted beige armchair with padded armrests and dark, curved wooden legs. The upholstery is quilted and luxurious, with a classic wingback design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest, winged backrest, and curved wooden legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the deep button tufting on the seat and backrest, as well as the symmetrical padded armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and wingback features, with visible seat depth.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, plain back upholstery and the two rear wooden legs.
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, deeply tufted with buttons
